meaning: adj.概念的,想象的,[语]表意的,实义的
examples: The method is relatively normative and notional and structurely.
Residual income is a measure of the center's profits after deducting a notional imputed interest cost.
But, the notional value of debt can't decline.
Boundary changes meant that the notional Labour majority in the seat had increased substantially.
Despite the Republicans' notional domination of the process, there will be few direct Democratic casualties.
